query:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO hops (
               trip_id,
               user_id,
               travel_type,
               origin_name,
               origin_lat,
               origin_lng,
               origin_country,
               dest_name,
               dest_lat,
               dest_lng,
               dest_country,
               start_date,
               end_date,
               raw_json,
               updated_at
           ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, datetime('now'))
